# Workshop-1--Sport-Venue-Reservation-System
## Project Overview
The Sports Venue Reservation System is a Command Line based development, as part of the Compuerized Management Information System (CMIS). The system is develop to managing and booking sports facilities for a sport venue rental company. It allows users to view available venues, make reservations, and calculate booking costs automatically. For administration, allow to manage the facilities status and assign user's booking. Further more, it can generate financials report for analysis purposes.

## Objectives
1. To provide an easy-to-use platform for booking sports venues
2. To manage venue information efficiently
3. To automate booking and price calculation
4. To prevent double booking of time slots

## Features
1. CRUD operations for venue management
2. Automatic price calculation
3. Time slot conflict prevention
4. Simple and user-friendly interface
